hero.badge: 100% offline, no data leaves your machine
hero.description: Global shortcut. Speak into your mic. Text appears at your cursor. Works in any app. Powered by Whisper AI, runs entirely on your machine.
hero.free: Free and open source. No account required.

vscode.name: VS Code
vscode.tagline: Dictate comments while your hands stay on the keyboard
vscode.example: Decode the JWT, verify expiry, then check the revocation list

notion.name: Notion
notion.tagline: Capture meeting notes at the speed of conversation
notion.example: Coordinate with backend team on auth flow before Thursday release

slack.name: Slack
slack.tagline: Reply to messages at the speed of thought
slack.example: Just pushed the fix for the race condition, ready for another look

email.name: Email
email.tagline: Compose emails without touching the keyboard
email.example: Attached the updated timeline with revised milestones we discussed

terminal.name: Terminal
terminal.tagline: Speak your commands instead of typing them
terminal.example: git commit -m add multi-language auto-detection with fallback

interludes.first: Your voice. Your words. Right where you need them.
interludes.second: No cloud. No account. No compromise. Just you and your voice.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.globalShortcutDesc: Ctrl+Shift+H from any app. VS Code, terminal, browser, Slack. Works everywhere.
features.offlineDesc: Whisper AI runs locally on your machine. No internet, no cloud, no data sent.
features.autoPasteDesc: Text is automatically pasted at your cursor position. No manual copy-paste.
features.multiLanguageDesc: French, English, Spanish, German and 90+ languages with auto-detection.
features.fastDesc: OpenBLAS acceleration, model pre-loaded in RAM. Transcription in 2-3 seconds.
features.openSourceDesc: AGPL-3.0 licensed. Inspect the code, contribute, or fork it.

download.title: Download CursorVoice
download.description: Free, open source, no account required. Works offline.
